asset_id.description: Unique identifier for each brand asset in the catalog
asset_id.diversity_guidance: Generate sequential or pseudo-random alphanumeric IDs with consistent prefix 'BA-' followed by 6-digit number

asset_title.diversity_guidance: Vary business types (coffee shop, restaurant, boutique, fitness studio, real estate, SaaS, e-commerce), asset types (logo, menu board, banner, social graphic, email header, loyalty card, story template), and descriptors (seasonal, promotional, lifestyle, product-focused). Keep titles concise (3-8 words).
asset_title.query_alignment: Include terms like 'logo variations', 'menu board', 'Italian food', 'summer promotion', 'holiday sale', 'modern kitchen', 'customer testimonial', 'spring collection', 'loyalty program', 'Instagram story', 'pasta', 'coffee shop', 'brand identity'

asset_description.content_pattern: 2-4 sentences describing the visual asset's purpose, visual style, color scheme, intended use case, and which marketing channels or business contexts it supports. Reference the asset_type, campaign_theme, and business_vertical.
asset_description.diversity_guidance: Vary sentence structure, description length (80-250 words), vocabulary (collateral, visual identity, brand asset, marketing material, promotional graphic), and level of design detail. Some descriptions focus on visual style, others on use case, others on campaign context.
asset_description.query_alignment: Include searchable terms: 'logo variations', 'menu board', 'brand identity', 'coffee shop signage', 'Italian food', 'pasta', 'restaurant dining', 'food and beverage collateral', 'summer promotion', 'holiday sale', 'modern kitchen', 'customer testimonial', 'spring collection', 'loyalty program graphics', 'Instagram story template', 'social media graphic', 'email template', 'product photo', 'discount badge', 'seasonal campaign', 'promotional banner', 'class schedule', 'fashion photo', 'color palette', 'virtual tour', 'listing description', 'case study', 'quote graphic', 'video clip'
asset_description.tiering_guidance: Tier 1 (20%): Dense marketing asset terminology — explicitly mention logo variations, menu boards, brand identity, specific food/beverage imagery, loyalty program graphics, seasonal promotions, and multimodal content types. Tier 2 (40%): Use synonymous vocabulary — visual collateral, brand materials, promotional content, campaign assets, marketing graphics, business signage, social content — without exact query keyword matches. Tier 3 (40%): Tangentially related content — generic design descriptions, abstract color/layout notes, administrative metadata descriptions, or assets from unrelated verticals (e.g., legal document templates, HR onboarding graphics).

asset_type.description: The type or format category of the brand asset
asset_type.diversity_guidance: Distribute across all 18 types; weight Logo, Social Media Graphic, and Promotional Banner slightly higher (10% each); ensure all types appear at least 10 times across 400 rows

content_category.description: High-level content category grouping for the asset, used for faceted filtering and discovery
content_category.diversity_guidance: Mix evenly across all 12 categories; Brand Identity and Social Media Content can be slightly more frequent as they apply across verticals

business_vertical.description: The industry vertical the asset is designed for or most applicable to
business_vertical.diversity_guidance: Weight Food & Beverage (20%), Retail & E-commerce (15%), and General Small Business (15%) slightly higher to reflect core use cases; distribute remaining 50% across other verticals

campaign_theme.description: The marketing campaign theme or promotional context the asset belongs to
campaign_theme.diversity_guidance: Ensure Summer Promotion, Holiday Sale, Spring Collection, and Loyalty Program appear frequently (5-8% each); distribute remaining themes evenly

color_palette_tags.description: Color palette descriptors for the asset, enabling color-based discovery and brand consistency matching
color_palette_tags.diversity_guidance: Each row should have 1-3 color palette tags; allow multi-value; distribute across warm, cool, neutral, and seasonal palettes

file_format.description: The file format of the brand asset

owner_account_id.description: The account ID of the business or user who owns this asset
owner_account_id.diversity_guidance: Generate 50 distinct account IDs; distribute assets unevenly (some accounts have 20+ assets, most have 3-8, simulating real usage patterns)

is_active.description: Whether the asset is currently active and available for use

upload_date.description: The date the asset was uploaded to the platform
upload_date.diversity_guidance: Range from 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-15; weight 60% of dates in last 18 months; include some seasonal clustering around Q4 (holiday campaigns) and Q1-Q2 (spring/summer campaigns)

reuse_count.description: Number of times the asset has been reused or referenced across campaigns
reuse_count.diversity_guidance: Range 0-500; use a right-skewed distribution: 40% of assets have 0-5 reuses, 40% have 6-50, 15% have 51-200, 5% have 201-500 (viral/flagship assets)

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the visual asset, indicating platform suitability (e.g., 9:16 for Stories, 1:1 for feed posts)

template_id.description: Unique identifier for each template in the library
template_id.diversity_guidance: Generate sequential alphanumeric IDs with prefix 'TPL-' followed by 5-digit number

template_name.diversity_guidance: Vary industry tags (Coffee Shop, Restaurant, Boutique, Real Estate, Fitness), platform targets (Instagram, Email, Facebook, Print, Google Ads), content types (Story, Post, Banner, Newsletter, Flyer, Campaign), and descriptors (Seasonal, Minimal, Bold, Elegant, Playful). Keep names concise (4-9 words).
template_name.query_alignment: Include terms like 'menu board', 'Instagram story', 'email campaign', 'social media', 'promotional banner', 'loyalty program', 'holiday sale', 'summer promotion', 'Italian restaurant', 'coffee shop', 'spring collection', 'customer testimonial', 'class schedule', 'listing description', 'case study', 'discount badge', 'seasonal email'

template_description.content_pattern: 3-5 sentences describing the template's design purpose, visual style, customization options, target business type, and ideal marketing use case. Reference the template_category, industry_tag, campaign_type, and platform_target.
template_description.diversity_guidance: Vary description length (100-300 words), vocabulary (template, layout, design framework, creative scaffold, marketing format), and focus (some emphasize design aesthetics, others emphasize use case, others emphasize customization ease). Mix formal and conversational tones.
template_description.query_alignment: Include searchable terms: 'menu board layout', 'Instagram story template', 'email campaign template', 'social media graphic', 'promotional banner', 'loyalty program design', 'holiday sale template', 'summer promotion layout', 'Italian restaurant', 'food and beverage', 'coffee shop branding', 'spring collection', 'customer testimonial graphic', 'quote template', 'case study layout', 'class schedule template', 'fitness studio', 'real estate listing', 'modern kitchen', 'virtual tour', 'e-commerce product', 'discount badge', 'seasonal marketing', 'small business marketing', 'brand identity', 'social proof'
template_description.tiering_guidance: Tier 1 (20%): Explicitly mention specific template use cases matching demo queries — menu board templates for restaurants, Instagram story templates for seasonal promotions, email templates for holiday sales, loyalty card designs for coffee shops, testimonial quote graphics for SaaS companies. Tier 2 (40%): Use related vocabulary — marketing layouts, promotional design frameworks, social content scaffolds, campaign visual systems, digital marketing materials — without exact query matches. Tier 3 (40%): Generic or tangentially related templates — corporate presentation decks, internal HR communication templates, generic grid layouts, abstract design systems with no specific industry context.

template_category.description: The functional category of the template based on its primary marketing use
template_category.diversity_guidance: Distribute evenly; Social Media Post and Email Newsletter can be slightly more frequent (10-12% each); ensure all 12 categories appear meaningfully

industry_tag.description: The industry or business vertical the template is designed for
industry_tag.diversity_guidance: Weight Food & Beverage (15%), Coffee & Cafe (10%), Restaurant & Dining (10%), and Retail & E-commerce (12%) higher; distribute remaining 53% across other industries

campaign_type.description: The type of marketing campaign the template is optimized for
campaign_type.diversity_guidance: Seasonal Promotion (10%), Holiday Campaign (10%), and Brand Awareness (8%) should be most common; distribute remaining evenly

platform_target.description: The digital or physical platform the template is designed and sized for
platform_target.diversity_guidance: Instagram Feed (18%), Instagram Story (15%), Email Newsletter (15%), Facebook Post (12%) most common; distribute remaining 40% across other platforms

customization_complexity.description: The level of design skill or effort required to customize the template
customization_complexity.diversity_guidance: Beginner (45%), Intermediate (40%), Advanced (15%) — reflecting the small business focus of the platform

is_premium.description: Whether the template is part of the premium paid tier or available in the free plan
is_premium.diversity_guidance: 35% true (premium), 65% false (free) — reflecting freemium model for small business accessibility

popularity_score.description: Normalized popularity score based on downloads, uses, and user ratings (0.0 to 10.0)
popularity_score.diversity_guidance: Use a right-skewed distribution: range 0.5 to 10.0; most scores between 3.0-7.5; top 10% of templates score 8.0-10.0; bottom 10% score below 2.0

last_updated.description: The date the template was last updated or refreshed
last_updated.diversity_guidance: Range from 2021-06-01 to 2024-12-01; weight 70% of templates updated in last 24 months; cluster some updates around seasonal campaign periods (Oct-Dec for holiday, Mar-May for spring)

embedding_id.description: Unique identifier for each visual embedding record
embedding_id.diversity_guidance: Generate sequential alphanumeric IDs with prefix 'EMB-' followed by 5-digit number

asset_ref_title.diversity_guidance: Vary visual subjects (espresso bar setup, pasta dish plated, summer sale window display, modern kitchen interior, fitness class action shot, spring fashion flatlay, customer smiling testimonial, holiday gift display), style descriptors (vibrant, minimal, rustic, editorial, lifestyle, product-focused, candid, branded), and asset type references (photo, graphic, illustration, video still, logo lockup). Keep titles descriptive but concise (4-10 words).
asset_ref_title.query_alignment: Include terms like 'logo variations', 'menu board', 'Italian food', 'pasta', 'coffee shop', 'summer promotion', 'holiday sale', 'modern kitchen', 'customer testimonial', 'spring collection', 'loyalty program', 'brand identity', 'Instagram story', 'promotional banner', 'class schedule', 'fashion photo', 'product photo', 'discount badge', 'signage', 'menu layout'

visual_caption.content_pattern: 2-4 sentences describing what is visually depicted in the asset, the photographic or design style, the emotional tone, the marketing context it serves, and any notable brand or compositional elements. Reference the modality, source asset context, and intended discovery use case.
visual_caption.diversity_guidance: Vary caption length (60-200 words), perspective (objective visual description vs. marketing-oriented caption vs. AI-generated alt-text style), vocabulary (depicts, showcases, features, captures, highlights, presents), and specificity (some captions are highly specific with food/design details, others are broader scene descriptions). Ensure each caption reads as a unique visual description.
visual_caption.query_alignment: Include searchable terms: 'logo variations', 'menu board', 'brand identity', 'coffee shop signage', 'Italian food', 'pasta dish', 'restaurant dining', 'food photography', 'summer promotion', 'promotional graphic', 'holiday sale', 'seasonal campaign', 'modern kitchen', 'property photo', 'virtual tour', 'customer testimonial', 'quote graphic', 'social proof', 'spring collection', 'fashion photo', 'color palette', 'loyalty program graphic', 'loyalty card design', 'Instagram story template', 'class schedule', 'fitness studio', 'workout video still', 'promotional banner', 'discount badge', 'product photo', 'e-commerce imagery', 'email header graphic', 'case study visual', 'menu layout', 'coffee cup', 'espresso', 'pasta', 'salad', 'boutique', 'apparel'
visual_caption.tiering_guidance: Tier 1 (20%): Rich, specific visual descriptions directly matching demo search queries — e.g., 'This image depicts three logo variations for a coffee shop brand, featuring the primary wordmark, a circular badge version, and a simplified icon lockup, all rendered in warm earth tones suitable for menu boards and loyalty cards.' Tier 2 (40%): Related visual content described with synonymous vocabulary — food photography described as 'culinary imagery', menu boards described as 'point-of-sale signage', seasonal promotions described as 'campaign visual content', brand assets described as 'visual identity collateral'. Tier 3 (40%): Loosely related or unrelated visual content — abstract design patterns, stock photo descriptions of generic business settings, non-marketing visual content like architectural diagrams, or assets from unrelated domains.

source_asset_id.description: Reference to the source asset in brand_asset_catalog that this embedding was generated from
source_asset_id.diversity_guidance: Match the BA- ID format from brand_asset_catalog; most source assets have 1 embedding, some popular assets may have 2-3 embeddings (different crop/region embeddings)

embedding_model_version.description: The embedding model version used to generate the vector representation of the visual asset
embedding_model_version.diversity_guidance: clip-vit-large-patch14-v1 (40%), clip-vit-base-patch32-v2 (30%), openai-ada-002-multimodal (15%), google-multimodal-embed-v1 (10%), elastic-elser-v2-visual (5%) — reflecting adoption curve of newer models

modality.description: The modality type of the visual content being embedded, used to filter by content type in multimodal search

owner_account_id.description: The account ID of the business or user who owns the source asset for this embedding
owner_account_id.diversity_guidance: Use the same 50 account IDs as brand_asset_catalog; maintain consistent ownership — embeddings should map to the same owner as their source asset

capture_date.description: The date the embedding was generated or the visual content was captured/created
capture_date.diversity_guidance: Range from 2022-01-01 to 2024-12-15; should generally match or be close to the upload_date of the corresponding source asset in brand_asset_catalog; weight 65% of dates in last 18 months
